designTokenTypes.name: color
designTokenTypes.definition: Semantic color role such as action, text, surface, border, status, or focus.

designTokenTypes.name: typography
designTokenTypes.definition: Readable text role such as display, heading, body, label, caption, or metadata.

designTokenTypes.name: spacing
designTokenTypes.definition: Layout rhythm role for gaps, padding, margins, and section spacing.

designTokenTypes.name: size
designTokenTypes.definition: Dimension role for controls, media, icons, hit areas, and bounded containers.

designTokenTypes.name: radius
designTokenTypes.definition: Corner shape role for controls, cards, overlays, and media.

designTokenTypes.name: border
designTokenTypes.definition: Stroke role for dividers, card outlines, inputs, and focus support.

designTokenTypes.name: shadow
designTokenTypes.definition: Elevation role for surfaces and overlays when visual tooling needs it.

designTokenTypes.name: icon
designTokenTypes.definition: Icon style role for size, stroke, corner treatment, and semantic usage.

designTokenTypes.name: motion
designTokenTypes.definition: Behavioral transition role for prototype contracts; final easing and timing remain downstream.

designTokenTypes.name: zindex
designTokenTypes.definition: Layering role for sticky regions, overlays, dialogs, popovers, and tooltips.

designTokenTypes.name: opacity
designTokenTypes.definition: Transparency role for disabled states, overlays, scrims, muted content, and emphasis control.

designTokenTypes.name: breakpoint
designTokenTypes.definition: Responsive threshold role for layout, content, and interaction behavior changes.
